testsuite.name: Класс Тестов на регистрацию нового пользователя

testcase.name: Заполнив все обязательные поля должно появиться модальное окно с заполнеными данными

testsuite.system-out: ========== ДИАГНОСТИКА ========== System.getProperty('browser'): opera Configuration.browser BEFORE: chrome Configuration.browser AFTER: opera ========== КОНЕЦ ДИАГНОСТИКИ ==========
testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.impl.WebDriverThreadLocalContainer - No webdriver is bound to current thread: 1 - let's create a new webdriver [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - BrowserName=chrome Version=128.0.6613.137 Platform=linux [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenide v. 7.2.0 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.webdriver.WebDriverFactory - Selenium WebDriver v. 4.18.1 build revision: b1d3319b48 [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.CreateDriverCommand - Created webdriver in thread 1: RemoteWebDriver -> RemoteWebDriver: chrome on linux (9fa476bee0be8f6fed14dfb19d6a05d8), downloadsFolder: null [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Register WebDriverInstance[config=StaticConfig, webDriver=RemoteWebDriver: chrome on linux (9fa476bee0be8f6fed14dfb19d6a05d8), proxy=null, downloadsFolder=null] in 1 [size=1] [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.DisposablesRegistry - Add shutdown hook in 1 [size=1] [Test worker] INFO com.codeborne.selenide.drivercommands.CloseDriverCommand - Close webdriver: 1 -> RemoteWebDriver: chrome on linux (9fa476bee0be8f6fed14dfb19d6a05d8)...
